posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m excited to share that you can now import Google Ads metrics into monday using the Data Importer monday app.

A few things that makes our integration special:

  • You can fully customise your imports (E.g. import by date or campaign, set column types, map to existing groups etc.)
  • You can import from several other sources within one app (e.g. Facebook Ads, Instagram, Google Sheets and more)
  • You can schedule your import to run automatically so that orders are constantly being added to your monday board.

I’ve also created a step-by-step tutorial for more details on how to import Shopify orders into monday.
